notes: UNVERIFIED. Standard FR-4, 1-4 layer. Values are JLCPCB's hard process minimums. min_trace/min_space 0.09mm (3.5 mil) is the tightest standard capability on 4-layer (with a 20%% surcharge below 4 mil); 2-layer 1oz minimum is 0.127mm (5 mil) and the recommended baseline is 6 mil. min_via_diameter 0.45mm and min_via_drill 0.2mm are the 4+ layer via minimums; 2-layer via minimum is 0.6mm pad / 0.3mm drill. min_annular_ring 0.15mm (6 mil). min_hole_to_hole 0.5mm (edge-to-edge PTH; via-to-via hole clearance is documented as 0.25mm). copper_to_edge 0.3mm per JLCPCB's DFM checklist. JLCPCB does NOT support blind/buried vias in standard production. Confirm all numbers on the live (JS-rendered) capabilities page before setting verified=true.
